entry.title: Five-Asset Tape: BNB +1.1% vs SOL +0.5% With BTC at $77,344

link.title: Five-Asset Tape: BNB +1.1% vs SOL +0.5% With BTC at $77,344

entry.content:
Generated (UTC): 2026-05-25 22:09:00

Reference prices: BTC $77,344 · ETH $2,112 · XRP $1.3545 · BNB $662.02 · SOL $85.38

Volatility: BTC low (+0.70%) · ETH low (+0.87%) · XRP low (+0.50%) · BNB medium (+1.06%) · SOL low (+0.50%)

The five-asset crypto complex is printing a BNB-led session while SOL lags on a blended OKX/Binance spot basis. Use the levels below as a reference frame — this note was generated from live quotes, not an LLM.

Bitcoin: Higher at $77,344 — Steady Tape

Bitcoin (BTC/USDT) is quoted near $77,344, showing low 24h volatility (+0.70%). OKX $77,345.80 · Binance $77,342.83. Watch whether price holds intraday support or tests the lower 24h band.

Ethereum: Higher at $2,112 — Steady Tape

Ethereum (ETH/USDT) is quoted near $2,112, showing low 24h volatility (+0.87%). OKX $2,111.97 · Binance $2,111.93. Watch whether price holds intraday support or tests the lower 24h band.

XRP: Higher at $1.3545 — Steady Tape

XRP (XRP/USDT) is quoted near $1.3545, showing low 24h volatility (+0.50%). OKX $1.35 · Binance $1.35. Watch whether price holds intraday support or tests the lower 24h band.

BNB: Higher at $662.02 — Momentum Build

BNB (BNB/USDT) is quoted near $662.02, showing medium 24h volatility (+1.06%). OKX $662.00 · Binance $662.05. Watch whether price holds intraday support or tests the lower 24h band.

Solana: Higher at $85.38 — Steady Tape

Solana (SOL/USDT) is quoted near $85.38, showing low 24h volatility (+0.50%). OKX $85.38 · Binance $85.38. Watch whether price holds intraday support or tests the lower 24h band.

Cross-Asset Synthesis and Risk Observations

Leadership between Bitcoin and altcoins should be tracked via relative strength — when ETH, SOL, and BNB outperform BTC, risk appetite tends to expand; underperformance suggests defensive positioning. Compare OKX and Binance prints when dispersion widens.

Monitoring the Crypto Landscape

Download the Bitcoin Pattern app on the App Store for live BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, and SOL charts with AI pattern recognition.

About Bitcoin Pattern

Bitcoin Pattern is an iOS app for crypto technical analysis — live multi-asset quotes, AI-assisted chart patterns, and multi-timeframe charts.

  • App Store: Search “Bitcoin Pattern” or visit Bitcoin Pattern.
  • Features: Pattern recognition, B/S signals, 24 indicators, dark mode.

Disclaimer: AI-assisted content for informational purposes only. Not investment advice.
